style_bible.visual_style: Cinematic sci-fi with high contrast, warm red-orange hues of Mars surface, detailed textures on spacesuits and rover, and realistic dust particles.
style_bible.camera_rules: Use steady and smooth camera movements; prefer 35mm and 50mm lenses for natural perspective; avoid shaky or handheld shots except subtle push-ins.
style_bible.continuity_rules: Maintain same astronaut in white and red spacesuit with helmet, same Mars rocky terrain with rover and communication equipment; consistent lighting and weather conditions.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Establish the astronaut stranded on Mars near a damaged rover.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Medium wide shot
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: Slow dolly forward
- subject & action: Astronaut kneeling beside a rover, inspecting damage
- environment details: Rocky red terrain, dust swirling lightly
- lighting: Harsh sunlight casting strong shadows
- cinematic look: Warm tones with slight lens flare

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Close-up
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Static
- subject & action: Astronaut's helmet visor reflecting Martian landscape, slight head turn
- environment details: Dust particles visible on visor
- lighting: Soft fill light on face
- cinematic look: High detail, reflective surfaces emphasized

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: Slow pan left
- subject & action: Rover with visible damage, communication antenna bent
- environment details: Distant rocky hills and red sky
- lighting: Natural sunlight
- cinematic look: Crisp and detailed

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Steady dolly and static shots with smooth pan
scenes.audio_cue: Ambient wind and faint mechanical beeping

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show astronaut attempting to repair rover and signal for rescue.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Medium shot
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Slow handheld push-in
- subject & action: Astronaut using tools on rover's control panel
- environment details: Dust particles in air, rover lights flickering
- lighting: Harsh sunlight with fill light on astronaut
- cinematic look: Tense and focused

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Close-up
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: Static
- subject & action: Astronaut's gloved hand pressing a button, sparks fly
- environment details: Control panel with blinking red lights
- lighting: Contrast between sunlight and sparks
- cinematic look: Dramatic with sharp highlights

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: Slow crane up
- subject & action: Astronaut standing beside rover raising arm signaling
- environment details: Dust storm beginning to pick up
- lighting: Sunlight filtered through dust
- cinematic look: Atmospheric and suspenseful

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Handheld push-in and crane shots for tension
scenes.audio_cue: Mechanical tool sounds mixed with rising wind

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Rescue arrives and astronaut is saved.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: Slow dolly out
- subject & action: Rescue rover approaching astronaut
- environment details: Dust clearing, red rocky landscape
- lighting: Soft sunlight with warm glow
- cinematic look: Hopeful and bright

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Medium close-up
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Static
- subject & action: Astronaut removing helmet, smiling
- environment details: Rescue rover door open behind
- lighting: Balanced natural light
- cinematic look: Warm and intimate

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: Steady pan right
- subject & action: Rescue rover driving away with astronaut inside
- environment details: Mars horizon with setting sun
- lighting: Golden hour lighting
- cinematic look: Peaceful and resolved

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Smooth dolly and steady pans for resolution
scenes.audio_cue: Soft mechanical hum and distant wind
